query: SELECT zoomLink, title, sessionDate FROM lectures WHERE zoomLink IS NOT NULL AND zoomLink != '' ORDER BY sessionDate DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3gJPMgbNvxobdJv.c80c7479a201 --database kEGM3BVtTzTes7GE5TMbVx --execute SELECT zoomLink, title, sessionDate FROM lectures WHERE zoomLink IS NOT NULL AND zoomLink != '' ORDER BY sessionDate DESC LIMIT 5;
